creator: qjail1@a1poweruser.com
text:
Created attachment 185794
port make files diff

Aaron Sachau sent email about bug he found. The "qjail console jailname" command that has a jail with a fib assigned to it was not working correctly. This error was introduced by changes done to correct coding syntax problems that the 
hs-shellcheck package found and corrected and then published in qjail-5.2. 
Reverted back to how qjail-5.1 did it. Aaron Sachau tested the patch. Fixed now.
